violations.text: The floors under the vending machines and storage room have an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the dry storage area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by dead mouse under 3-bay sink, and droppings in the corners of the cafeteria, under equipment in the kitchen, and food contact surfaces that are not in use. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings in cafeteria and kitchen using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. Establishment is to increase pest control as frequently as needed and have a pest control report for next inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris. Hood systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood vents have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

The floors under the vending machines and storage room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

The floors in the back storage area around the walls has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the front display refrigeration unit, and the back two door Traulsen. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

Behind the Vending machines has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
The tile floors in the back storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
The tile floors in the back storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
